Reusing CTR keystream allows an attacker who can observe two ciphertexts produced with the same key/IV to recover the XOR of the plaintexts, breaking confidentiality. Affects BC-JAVA from 1.59 before 1.84 (with backported fixes in 1.80.2 and 1.81.1).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00313, "percentile": 0.22994}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-574f-3g2m-x479", "github_reviewed_at":
